name: Riberesute Corporation
summary: Riberesute Corporation engages in real estate and construction businesses in Japan. It operates through Development Business, Construction Business, Real Estate Sales Business, and Other Business segments. The Development Business segment develops and sells condominiums, business hotels, etc. The Construction Business segment is engaged in the construction of custom-built houses and formwork carpentry. The Real Estate Sales Business segment engages in real estate sales. The Other Business segment provides brokerage and management of rental housing and brokerage of real estate. Riberesute Corporation was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Soka, Japan.
